title: mentha viridis subsp. nouletiana
intro: Mentha viridis subsp. nouletiana, also known as Noulet's mint, is a subspecies of the spearmint plant (Mentha viridis) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and carminative effects, which make it useful for treating digestive issues, headaches, and skin problems. The health benefits of Noulet's mint include its ability to alleviate nausea, improve digestion, and reduce stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Noulet's mint is often used in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
